allow: Bash(python -c "from polyworks_connector import parse_points_file, generate_macro, get_result_file_path; pts = parse_points_file\(''测量.txt''\); print\(f''Loaded {len\(pts\)} points:''\); [print\(f''  Point {i+1}: {p}''\) for i,p in enumerate\(pts\)]; macro = generate_macro\(pts, get_result_file_path\(\)\); print\(f''\\nGenerated macro \({len\(macro.splitlines\(\)\)} lines\):''\)")
